name: Will I lose my job if I file for work-related breathing problems?
description: Protected by law; document any retaliation and report it.

mainEntity.name: Will I lose my job if I file for work-related breathing problems?

acceptedAnswer.text: Protected by law; document any retaliation and report it.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation is illegal under OSHA/Utah law; protected activity includes reporting hazards.** Employers can't fire for comp claims[1]. Key factors: Document threats, keep performance records; file OSHA complaint if pressured. Rare but happens in small firms. Report anonymously first, know your rights. Legal support deters retaliation.
